summary: City of Austin Chapter 380 economic development agreements and ordinances, tracking project names, agreement documents, council resolutions, and status.
Address change records for Austin properties, documenting old and new street names, house numbers, and unit designations.
Austin Police Department NIBRS Group A offense crime data including offense type, location, zip code, victim demographics, and incident timing.
Geographic boundaries for City of Austin neighborhood reporting areas with shape geometry and area in square miles.
Geographic boundaries for Austin Police Department sectors and districts with codes, colors, and modification dates.
200-meter city grid tiles for Austin used for spatial reference and location indexing.
Address point dataset for Austin with street type, segment ID, address type, and place identifiers.
City-wide recycling collection schedules for Austin, listing collection day, week, zip code, and service type by address.
Austin street centerline segments with road class, full street name, address ranges, and block-level data.
Community input from the September 2015 Spirit of East Austin event, capturing what resources exist and are missing by theme and zip code.
Asian American Quality of Life survey responses from Austin covering ethnic origin, community issues, media habits, and quality of life concerns.
Active credit access business licenses in Austin including payday lenders and auto title lenders, with address, licensee, and council district.
City of Austin fleet vehicle data by class type, reporting fuel quantity, total miles, vehicle count, and maintenance costs.
City of Austin public art collection locations with artwork titles, dates, addresses, and geographic coordinates.
City of Austin Chapter 380 economic development agreements with fiscal impact estimates, job commitments, project descriptions, and council ordinances.
City of Austin fleet fuel usage broken down by ICMA class and fuel type including E85, CNG, biodiesel, propane, and diesel.
List of activated 5G wireless sites in Austin with node addresses and council district assignments.
Mobile food vendor ordinance areas in Austin showing permitted zones by organization name and type.
Asian American Quality of Life community comment themes from 2016, categorizing input by topic, department, and theme group.
FEMA floodplain boundaries for the Greater Austin area with flood zone classifications and floodway designations.
Weekly EMS incident summary for Austin tracking transports, cardiac and stroke incidents, fall incidents, traffic incidents, and community health assists.
City of Austin community service assets with addresses, activities, community registry affiliations, and contact information.
Curb inlet infrastructure data for Austin including watershed, street width, GPS coordinates, and maintenance records.
LGBTQIA+ Quality of Life Study survey responses from Austin covering housing, healthcare access, HIV testing, safety, and public benefit usage.
Manhole infrastructure records for Austin's stormwater system including GPS coordinates, material type, and watershed designation.
Austin school locations with graduation data linked to school districts, campus names, and geographic boundaries.
Direct campaign expenditure records for Austin elections including payee, amount, office sought, and council district.
Austin street network from the Austin Strategic Mobility Plan with ROW dimensions, road descriptions, council district, and pedestrian infrastructure details.
Public computer lab locations in Austin with number of computers, hours of operation, address, and zip code.
Austin Green Business Leader program data including business name, type, employee count, square footage, rating, and join date.
City of Austin service activity calendar listing dates, departments, locations, and clean-up descriptions.
Detailed land use inventory for Austin parcels with land use classification, parcel ID, and shape geometry.
City of Austin CTM customer satisfaction survey tracking percentage of customers reporting issue resolved from 2015 to 2023.
Austin trip data with origin and destination cell IDs, vehicle type, trip distance, and council district, used for mobility testing.
Austin Energy SPUR rebate product locations listing retailers, product categories, availability periods, and addresses by council district.
Austin census demographic data over time showing population percentages by year.
Recycle Right campaign collection routes for Austin with geographic geometry and route descriptions.
Austin garbage collection routes for 2015 with route type, supervisor number, collection day, and landfill assignment.
Northeast Service Center capital improvement project data for Austin Resource Recovery including project names, planning stages, and CIP identifiers.
Neighborhood plan status for Austin planning areas including zoning approval dates, infill option codes, and combined NPA designations.
City of Austin financial transaction data with fiscal year, department unit, object codes, and transaction amounts.
Living resource directory for Austin listing programs by category, address, hours, phone, and specifications.
Bulky item collection route boundaries for Austin with route name and scheduled collection dates.
Austin Fire Department response area boundaries showing battalion assignments, department names, and agreements.
Austin zoning notices for cases appearing before City Council, listing published date, council meeting date, and notice link.
Vaccines for Children (VFC) dose inventory report for Travis County pediatric providers tracking doses near expiration by vaccine, lot, and provider.
Survey monument locations in Austin with street address, elevation, y-coordinate, and community registry affiliations.
Bulky item collection route point data for Austin with route number, supervisor, and last and next collection dates.
Brownfield sites in Austin as of 2017 with location, district, leveraged funding, proposed redevelopment, and site activity status.
Brush collection route point data for Austin with route number, supervisor, and scheduled collection dates.
GTOPs (Greater Austin opportunity program) dashboard data tracking cumulative cash, in-kind, and volunteer contributions by year.
Austin hydrography polygon layer from 2006 showing water body features with names, feature codes, and geographic geometry.
Austin recycling collection routes for 2014 with route number, collection day, service week, and supervisor.
Austin recycling collection routes for 2013 with route number, collection day, service week, and cart delivery tracking.
Public computer lab locations in Austin with number of computers, hours, website, and neighborhood planning area affiliations.
